历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 16449 → 11924 → 12256 → 11666 → 11931. The ranking was higher in 2021, then significantly moved forward to around 12,000 from 2022 onward and stabilized. In the past 4 years, the fluctuation range was about 11,600–12,300. The 2025 baseline is about 11931. The university's enrollment in Jilin Province for Physics Category (including Science) was: 75 in 2021, 72 in 2022, 67 in 2023, 68 in 2024, and 75 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 77, a slight increase of 2 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 2.7%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 67th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 54 and 67, overall at an upper-middle level. The 2023 reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, involving school management responses, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 68th (average), with a comprehensive popularity of about 445,000. Short video exposure is at a mid-level, with no high-heat attention or obvious negative signals. No abnormal historical admission records were found for China University of Mining and Technology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Safety Science and Engineering was rated A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, and Civil Engineering A-. These advantageous disciplines highly correspond to the university's mining, safety, and surveying-related enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information are highly popular and recommended, with intense competition for admission. Traditional engineering majors like Mining, Civil Engineering, and Geology are relatively cold or have divided opinions. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jilin Province is about 110,868. Physics Category, estimated at about 72% of recent years, is about 80,000, slightly fewer than the 80,421 in 2025, slightly easing competition. China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, an off-site campus. Its enrollment scale in Jilin Province is about 75–77 students, a small proportion of the university's total national enrollment, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11931, a slight enrollment expansion of 2 students in 2026 (slightly intensifying competition), a slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in Jilin Province (slightly easing competition), a neutral university reputation, and the attraction of advantageous disciplines to specific candidates, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 12152, with a ranking range of 11652–12652.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 12152, with a range of 11652–12652. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (11652) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. Those with rankings in the middle (about 12152) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Safety Engineering (A+ discipline), Surveying (A-), Mechanical Engineering, and Energy and Power Engineering, while also considering Tier 1 majors with slightly lower ranking requirements. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (12652) are advised to use Tier 3 majors like Mining, Civil Engineering, and Geology as safety options, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with more favorable ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 2003 → 1940 → 2676 → 2083 → 1964. Enrollment in Jilin Province for History Category (including Liberal Arts): 6 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 10 in 2024, 13 in 2025; 2026 plan is 13, same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 67th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking between 54–67 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level. In 2023, reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, involving school management responses, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranked 68th (average), with a comprehensive popularity of about 445,000, showing no high attention or obvious negative signals; no abnormal admission records for China University of Mining and Technology; the university's liberal arts majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, English, Business Administration, Public Administration) have corresponding discipline evaluations where the university's overall strength is concentrated in engineering, with liberal arts disciplines not individually rated A- or above.

专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity (recommended), Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, foreign languages are generally wait-and-see, Business Administration is differentiated wait-and-see. 预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1964, the 2026 enrollment plan being unchanged, a slight decrease in Jilin Province History Category examinees (slightly eased competition), neutral university reputation, and relatively high popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1934, with a ranking range of 1586–2282.
